description: Founded VisibleSeed, a small studio building fast modern websites and automation systems for local businesses and student organizations.
Designed and shipped full-stack web apps end-to-end — UX, frontend, backend, infra, and ongoing support — with a focus on clean UI, performance, and reliability.
Built and maintain shared infrastructure on Cloudflare and Oracle Cloud (Workers, Pages, D1, R2, KV, Docker on Ubuntu) including a public status dashboard and an internal admin panel.
Set up the operations side too: branding, client onboarding, billing, and a lightweight runbook so each project stays maintainable after launch.
Conducted thorough undergraduate research on compiler design and high-level to low-level language translation.
Collaborated closely with mentors to refine development skills and deepen understanding of language design principles and compiler design methodologies.
Presented research and project outcomes at multiple universities, demonstrating language processing and compiler design expertise.
